Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Lianwo Electronic Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Lianwo Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is a typical 'veteran weak-current engineering contractor and software outsourcing shell on Zhujiang Road' that was misjudged by the system as a major electronic manufacturing plant. The forensic engine has completely eradicated the underlying false transnational consumer electronics OEM data pollution implicated by Apple Inc. The official commercial registry system extremely hastily categorized it into the 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing' sector at the top of the industrial pyramid simply because its name contains 'Electronic Technology' and includes a perfunctory 'R&D of specialized electronic materials'. However, the physical probe and common-sense engine immediately executed a comprehensive peeling: this is an old micro-enterprise established in 2010, with a paid-in capital of 2.74 million, but its 2024 insured headcount is only '3 people'! The most fatal coup de grace comes from its registered coordinates: 'Room 602-2, 6th Floor, Building 3, Dongding Mansion, No. 657 Zhujiang Road, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' 'Dongding Mansion' is a landmark commercial office building at the eastern end of Zhujiang Road (Nanjing's famous computer and digital street). In a partitioned single room (Room 602-2) on the 6th floor of an office building, relying on a boss and 2 employees to establish a heavy-asset industrial assembly line manufacturing electronic devices? This not only violates physical common sense, but the security guards downstairs would also stop you. Reviewing its extremely grounded true business license: the core business is 'construction engineering construction' (affiliated with engineering qualifications), as well as 'software development; internet security services; network technology services; security equipment sales'. The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant; this is a Three-Person Security/Network Contractor & Software Shell hidden on the 6th floor of a Zhujiang Road office building. The boss (Zhou Aiqiang) is highly likely a veteran weak-current engineer or contractor, leading two buddies, using Zhujiang Road as a base, to take on some external jobs like running network cables in office buildings, installing surveillance (security equipment), writing some outsourced software, or construction engineering work.
